goals.title: Add internal task marker source helpers and a command-first source-ba...
goals.objective: Add internal task marker source helpers and a command-first source-backed checkbox toggle in @zorid/editor. Toggle current task lines between unchecked and checked via CodeMirror transactions; non-task lines no-op; click handling is deferred unless it stays tiny and fully tested.
goals.evidence: Added packages/editor/src/live-preview/task-toggle.ts with task marker parsing and command-first CodeMirror transaction toggle helpers; re-exported experimental helpers from live-preview and package root. Click handling deferred. Verified pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck.

goals.title: Add task toggle/source/history tests. Cover unchecked/checked toggles...
goals.objective: Add task toggle/source/history tests. Cover unchecked/checked toggles, uppercase checked policy, indented tasks, non-task no-ops, unrelated text preservation, mounted onChange behavior, undo/redo, source reveal around task markers, and silent external setText behavior.
goals.evidence: Added tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts covering task marker parsing, uppercase checked normalization, indented tasks, non-task/table no-ops, command-first transaction toggles, exact unrelated text preservation, mounted onChange userEvent emission, invertible transaction undo/redo simulation, active marker source reveal, and silent external setText behavior. Verified pnpm test -- tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts.

goals.title: Verify Markdown list/task/blockquote keymap behavior before adding an...
goals.objective: Verify Markdown list/task/blockquote keymap behavior before adding any custom input logic. Add mounted tests for current markdown() Enter/Backspace behavior; if behavior is sufficient, document no custom keymap was added. If not, use only official CodeMirror keymaps/extensions already in dependencies and test the gap.
goals.evidence: Added tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts proving @codemirror/lang-markdown markdownKeymap exposes official Enter/Backspace commands and mounted editors continue unordered lists, task lists, and blockquotes plus remove empty list/blockquote markup through official commands. No custom keymaps added. Verified pnpm test -- tests/editor-markdown-keymap.test.ts.

goals.title: Add an internal replace-preview capability plus exactly one renderer...
goals.objective: Add an internal replace-preview capability plus exactly one renderer slice: inactive inline-code backtick delimiter hiding. Use heading marker hiding only as documented fallback if inline-code delimiter tests prove brittle. Preserve source text and reveal raw source on focused selection intersection.
goals.evidence: Added internal LivePreviewRange kind/activation range support and Decoration.replace handling. Implemented exactly one replace-preview slice: inactive inline-code delimiter ranges with full code-span activation reveal. Updated tests for delimiter replace ranges, active source reveal, deterministic ordering, and source preservation. Verified pnpm --filter @zorid/editor run typecheck and pnpm test -- tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts.
